    What is Flashstake?

    ALL THE YIELD, NONE OF THE WAIT.

    Flashstake allows you to lock up crypto and earn instant upfront yield from the future.

    READ THE DOCS

    New, exciting, and actually innovative.

    – ANTHONY SASSANO (THE DAILY GWEI)

    No-liquidation leverage.

    – @0XSISYPHUS

    App on mainnet and Arbitrum, Flashstake, lets you lock in & get upfront yield on assets like GLP or stETH, which you can use for no-liquidation leverage

    I.e. you can lock your GLP right now for a fixed APR of 37% for 6 months & gamble the upfront yieldhttps://t.co/LOYpK2sZNP

    — Sisyphus (@0xSisyphus) March 28, 2023

    Fascinating take on alternative forms of liquidity bootstrapping.

    – @COLE0X

    Tempted to try a max-yield $GLP degen strategy with a small amt. of $:

    > Deposit glp onto @Flashstake to sell future yields
    > Use future yields to 17x leverage buy glp on @YamaFinance
    >Use yields from Yama to buy more glp, repeat process

    — Cole (@cole0x) March 29, 2023

    TOKENS  x  TIME  =  YIELD

    How does it work?

    0:34
    1

    Tokens

    Select how much crypto you want to lock up.
    2

    Time

    Select the amount of time you want to lock it.
    3

    Yield

    Instantly receive the full yield of your stake.
    TRY IT YOURSELF
    NO LIQUIDATIONS

    No matter the volatility in prices or interest rates, your deposits are secure. No liquidation risk.

    EARLY WITHDRAW

    Withdraw your principal at any time by paying back a portion of your upfront yield using fTokens.

    REAL YIELD

    Currently, the Flashstake protocol takes a small fee on all upfront yield generated. This yield is owned by FLASH token holders.

    FEATURED IN DEFIANT NEWS
    FUNDED BY AAVE GRANTS
    MULTIPLE SECURITY AUDITS

    Real-World Use Cases

    Flashstake is more than a single project. It is a protocol that unlocks endless potential real-world use cases.

    REAL YIELD TOKEN

    What is FLASH?

    When a user performs a Flashstake, a small fee is transferred to the Flash Capacitor.

    TOKENOMICS
    TRY YOUR FIRST FLASHSTAKE OPEN THE DAPP
